_comment: EDITOR-CONTROLLED fire restrictions — the SINGLE SOURCE for both the Alert tile and the /conditions fire-restriction detail section. The worker reads it every 15 min and includes it in conditions.json. To change: set stage to none|1|2 and update the fields below. When stage is 'none' the prohibited/allowed/penalty/scope/effective are ignored. See docs/FIRE-RESTRICTIONS.md and worker/README.md.
scope: NF lands below 8,000 ft, including Vallecito Lake; designated Wilderness excluded
summary: No campfires, charcoal, or wood/coal stove fires; no outdoor smoking. Propane/gas stoves OK. $530 min fine.
prohibited: Outdoor smoking (except in a vehicle or building)
allowed: Propane/gas stoves & lanterns with shut-off valves
Fires in permanent Forest Service campfire rings in developed sites
